titleStmt.title: SII 24.400: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 400. (A.R. No. 266 of 1930.) II PRĀKĀRA, SĒṈAIMUDALIYĀR SHRINE, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Records a gift of the annual income of two-hundred poṉ of the village Vayiruchi in Śēla-nāḍu, a sub-division of Kuṉṟattūr-chāvaḍi by Timmarasar alias Kṛishṇarāya-Nāyakar, son of Daṇḍu Ōbaḷa-Araśar, for daily offerings in the temple, assigning a share of the offerings on special occasions such as amāvāsya, etc. as viṭṭavan-viḻukkāḍu to Parāśara Bhaṭṭar Tiruvēṅgaḍa Ayyaṅgār, the pontiff (āchārya) of the donor. The details of date, viz., Śaka 1452, Vikṛita, Mēsha śu. trayōdaśī, Sunday, Hasta correspond regularly to 1530 A.D., April 10, Sunday; ·45; ·80;

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīman mahārājādhirāja rājaparameśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra Accuta devamahārāyar prithivirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam
10 4(10)5 10 2 Itaṉmel cellāniṉṟa vikṛtasamvatsarattu meṣanāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu trayodaśiyum Ādityavāramum peṟṟa hastanakṣa[ ttira*] ttu nā
ḷ perumāḷḷ and nā are written below the line. śrīraṅganāthadevarkku taṇṭu Opaḷa Aracar putrar timmarasar Āṉa kṛṣṇarāyanāyakkar Ubhayamāka poliyūṭṭukkuc cetta kuṉṟattūr Ucāvaṭikku cellum
cela nāṭṭil vayiruci grāmam Oṉṟukku rekaippaṭi ḷe 2 100 Intap poṉ Iruṉūṟṟukkum poviyūṭṭuk kaṭṭaḷai Āka nāḷ Oṉṟukku Amutu ceytaruḷum
taḷikai nālukku varuṣam Oṉṟukku nāḷ 3 100 6 10 5 kkut taḷikai 1000 4 100 6 10- kku taḷikai Oṉṟukku U 1 Āka ḷe 100 4 10 6 Amāvāsyai toṟum Amutu ce
ytaruḷum kaṭṭaḷai pori Amutu 4 100kku U 5 vellam cer 2 10 kku U ý1 miḷaku nāḻikku U 2ý cirakam n=tapaý Ēlam n=tapa kku kku pu Araikkāl teṅkāy ṉūṟṟukkum pa
ḻam Iruṉūṟṟukkum U 10 2 10 6 Āka U 7u Atirasam 2 100-kku U cāý vaṭai 2 100-kku U 4ý sukiyaṉ 2 100-kku U 5 Āka ḷe 1 U 5 cantaṉam paṭi 2 10-kku U 2 10ý Aṭaik kāyamutu 2 1000-kkuu 1ý
Ilaiyamutu 2 1000kku U ḷuý taḷikai Añcukku pu5 Ākaḷa 3 U 1 Āka varuṣam Oṉṟukku ḷe U 2 Āka ḷe100ḷai10 3 U 2 10 toppukkaṭṭaḷaikkut taḷikai 4 10kku ḷe 4ý vecca
mutu kūṉ 4 10-kku ḷe 1ý Atirasam 2 100-kku U 6ý vaṭai 2 100-kku U 4 sukiyaṉ 2 100-kku U 5ý pori Amutu 4 100-kku vellam campāram teṅkāy paḻam Uṭpaṭa U 7ý cantaṉa
m (p)paṭi 2 10-kku U 2(1/2)ý Aṭaikkāyamutu 2 1000-kku U 1ý Ilaiyamutu 2 1000-kku U 10 Āka U 4 Āka meṟpaṭi 7u 6ý parivaṭṭa vilaikkupon_ 10 perumāḷ parikalattukku sambhāvaṉai
§ 8 U 2 Ākaḷe 2 100 Inta poṉ Iruṉūṟṟukkum Inta grāmam Oṉṟum śrīpaṇṭārattile Aṉupavittukkoṇṭu Intap poviyūṭṭukkaṭṭaḷaippaṭiyile Ā cantrā
rkka sthāyi Āka naṭakkak kaṭavatākavum Intap poliyūṭṭuk kaṭṭaḷaippaṭikku Uṇṭāṉa viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu tiṉakkaṭṭaḷai taḷikai nālil Oṉṟum Amāvāsyaikka
ṭṭaḷaikkum toppuk kaṭṭaḷaikkum viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu pattil Oṉṟum kṛṣṇarāya nāyakkar tammuṭaiya Ācāryyar parācarapaṭṭar tiruveṅkaṭayyaṅkār(ṟ)ku
kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭuk kuṭuttapaṭiyiṉāle san=tānaparamparaiyāka naṭattak kaṭavatākavum §
Digital edition of SII 24.400 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
